error: at the end of the film, Dominic and Brian share one final race to honor their friendship, with the two of them taking off together into the sunset.
correction: Um, actually, while Dominic and Brian do share a car based moment at the end of the film, they do not have a race in this scene. Instead, the film concludes with a peaceful, emotional farewell, where Brian drives off with his family.
title: Fast and Furious

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: Grand Theft Auto 5 first released in 2013 on the PlayStation 3 and Xbox 360. Set in Los Angeles and its surrounding countryside the game has had the strange distinction of being released on three generations of games consoles with re-releases on the PlayStation 4 and Xbox One in 2014 and for the PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X and S in 2022.
error: Set in Los Angeles and its surrounding countryside
correction: Um, actually, the game is set in Los Santos, a fictionalised version of Los Angeles.
title: Grand Theft Auto

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: During the Insomniac game Marvel’s Spider-Man 2 the player takes control of Peter Parker, Miles Morales and Mary Jane Watson throughout the story in an effort to take care of both Kraven the Hunter and Venom. Peter Parker and Miles Morales are frequently swapped between both in free roam sections and during missions whereas MJ is only playable during certain missions.
error: the player takes control of Peter Parker, Miles Morales and Mary Jane Watson throughout the story
correction: Um, actually, the player also take control of Harry Osborne/Venom.
title: Marvel’s Spider-Man 2

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In the Uncharted series, Nathan Drake, a treasure hunter and adventurer, embarks on globe-trotting quests to uncover legendary treasures. In Uncharted 2: Among Thieves, he searches for the legendary lost city of Iram on the Pillars and faces off against warlord Zoran Lazarević, who seeks the treasure for its rumored supernatural powers. During the game Drake reconvenes with his ex Elena Fisher as well Victor Sullivan and Chloe Frazer.
error: In Uncharted 2: Among Thieves, he searches for the legendary lost city of Iram on the Pillars
correction: Um, actually, Iram of the Pillars is the place Drake is searching for in Uncharted 3. In Uncharted 2 they are seeking the Cintamani Stone in the lost city of Shambhala.
title: Uncharted

author: Fan Submitted
phrase_text: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim opens with the player, captured alongside a group of Stormcloak prisoners, being taken to the town of Helgen to be executed. As the prisoners are lined up at the chopping block, the dragon Alduin attacks the town, and in the ensuing chaos nobody is beheaded before the player escapes.
error: nobody is beheaded before the player escapes
correction: Um, actually, one Stormcloak soldier is beheaded first. After mouthing off at the guards, he is dragged to the block and executed moments before Alduin arrives to disrupt the player's own execution.
title: Skyrim

author: Fan Submitted
phrase_text: Introduced in the Deep Space Nine episode "The Search, Part I", the USS Defiant is officially classed as an escort ship and was designed as a prototype warship to fight the Borg - and due to this, only one Defiant-class ship was ever created.
error: only one Defiant-class ship was ever created
correction: Um, actually, multiple Defiant-class ships have been built. The original Defiant was destroyed by the Breen at the Second Battle of Chin'toka in 2375 and replaced by the USS Sao Paulo, which was renamed Defiant.
title: Star Trek

author: By CB Johnny
phrase_text: Prior to becoming a professional recording artist, "Weird Al" Yankovic enjoyed submitting amateur home-recorded songs to the comedy radio program "The Dr. Demento Show." There, his future drummer Jon "Bermuda" Schwartz met Al outside the sound booth and offered to bang on his accordion case for a live in-studio performance of "My Bologna."
error: a live in-studio performance of "My Bologna."
correction: Um, actually, that live 1980 studio performance was "Another One Rides the Bus." "My Bologna" was an earlier solo demo Al recorded by himself in a college bathroom, not a live in-studio recording.
title: "Weird Al" Yankovic

author: By TDean15
phrase_text: Nimona was originally a web comic made by ND Stevenson that was published in 2015 to great acclaim. After a troubled production, a film adaptation of the same name was released in 2023. The 2 versions have a significantly different story but both focus on self-proclaimed supervillain Ballister, and Nimona, a chaotic shapeshifter who wishes to become his sidekick.
error: self-proclaimed supervillain
correction: Um, actually, Ballister is not a supervillain in the film version. He is instead an outlaw after he is accused of murdering the Queen.
title: Nimona

author: By TDean15
phrase_text: In the Boiling Isles, where most of The Owl House takes place, witches are assigned to covens by being branded with a sigil at an early age. Examples of these are the Bard Coven and the Construction Coven. Any witch not in a coven is known as a wild witch, an outlaw capable of all forms of magic - such as Eda, who does not join a coven throughout the series.
error: who does not join a coven throughout the series
correction: Um, actually, Eda does join a coven. She is covenless at the start but is branded with a sigil in the final episode of Season 2 as part of a plan to stop a draining spell cast by Emperor Belos.
title: The Owl House

author: By TDean15
phrase_text: Contrary to popular opinion, Princess Peach is not always a damsel in distress. Peach has been a playable character in several games including in "Super Mario Land", "Super Mario 3D World" and "Super Mario Bros. Wonder". She has also received 2 games of her own, "Super Princess Peach" for the DS and "Princess Peach: Showtime!" for the Nintendo Switch.
error: in "Super Mario Land"
correction: Um, actually, Peach is not playable in "Super Mario Land" - she does not appear in it at all. The rescued princess there is Daisy, and Mario is the game's only playable character.
title: Super Mario

author: By ChaFerRod
phrase_text: While many days are eventful in this series, one of the most is Thursday, July 15, 1999. On this day, Josuke and company face off against 4 significant Stands - Cheap Trick, Highway Star, Enigma, and Superfly.
error: Cheap Trick, Highway Star, Enigma, and Superfly
correction: Um, actually, Highway Star is not fought that day; its user Yuya Fungami instead helps Josuke defeat Enigma. The real fourth Stand is Killer Queen, unleashing its Bites the Dust ability.
title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

author: By Ico
phrase_text: In the game "Super Mario Sunshine," Mario, Princess Peach, Toadsworth, and several Toads crash into Isle Delfino, an island filled with tourist attractions such as Delfino Plaza - the main hub - Sirena Beach, and Pinna Park.
error: crash into Isle Delfino
correction: Um, actually, they don't crash into Isle Delfino. Their plane, the Toad Express, makes a rough landing on the Delfino Airstrip after goop and a Piranha Plant block the runway.
title: Super Mario Sunshine

author: Fan Submitted
phrase_text: Foster child Billy Batson meets a wizard who grants him the ability to transform into an adult superhero, with powers such as flight and super strength. However, he's still a child at heart, which explains why he likes to shout "Shazam" when he transforms, and also why one of the first things he did as a hero was try to buy beer.
error: which explains why he likes to shout "Shazam" when he transforms
correction: Um, actually, that's not why he shouts "Shazam!" Shazam is the name of the wizard who granted his powers, and Billy must invoke it to transform - it's also an acronym for Solomon, Hercules, Atlas, Zeus, Achilles, and Mercury.
title: Shazam!

author: By Redmin
phrase_text: In Fallout: New Vegas, the player - the Courier - is greeted by Benny with a monologue and a bullet to the head. Benny is the head of the Chairmen, whose family runs the Tops casino, one of the three casinos on the New Vegas Strip that operate under Mr. House. The other two are the Ultra-Luxe, run by the White Glove Society, and the Lucky 38, which serves as Mr. House's base of operations and is closed to the public - except for the Courier.
error: three casinos on the New Vegas Strip
correction: Um, actually, the New Vegas Strip has four casinos. The fourth is the Gomorrah, run by the Omertas, a family of gangsters who deal in smuggling, prostitution and other vices.
title: Fallout: New Vegas

author: By SuperCJM
phrase_text: Among the three hidden opponents in Mortal Kombat II is Noob Saibot. Though his name is that of Mortal Kombat's creator, Tobias Boon, spelled backwards, it would later be revealed in Mortal Kombat: Deception that he is actually the undead wraith form of Bi-Han, the original Sub-Zero.
error: Mortal Kombat's creator, Tobias Boon, spelled backwards
correction: Um, actually, Mortal Kombat wasn't created by one person named Tobias Boon. It has two creators - Ed Boon and John Tobias - whose surnames spelled backwards form the name Noob Saibot.
title: Mortal Kombat

author: By SuperCJM
phrase_text: Among the three hidden opponents in Mortal Kombat II is Noob Saibot. Though his name is that of Mortal Kombat's creator, Tobias Boon, spelled backwards, it would later be revealed in Mortal Kombat: Deception that he is actually the undead Wraith form of Bi-Han, the original Sub-Zero.
error: Mortal Kombat's creator, Tobias Boon, spelled backwards
correction: Um, actually, Mortal Kombat has two creators, and Noob Saibot combines their surnames reversed. Ed Boon becomes Noob and John Tobias becomes Saibot.
title: Mortal Kombat

author: By SuperCJM
phrase_text: Walt Disney holds the record for both the most Oscar nominations and the most Oscar wins of any individual person, at 59 and 22, respectively. Though he was given Honorary Oscars for Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs and Fantasia, all of his competitive nominations were in the Documentary and Short Film categories.
error: all of his competitive nominations were in the Documentary and Short Film categories
correction: Um, actually, he received one competitive nomination for a feature-length narrative film - a Best Picture nomination for "Mary Poppins" at the 1965 Academy Awards.
title: Academy Awards

author: By goldpuffle
phrase_text: In Minecraft, many crafted objects take on the texture of the wood used to make them, so an oak chest and a spruce chest look different. Some blocks ignore this entirely - a bookshelf always uses the oak planks texture no matter what wood you craft it from, and a painting's wooden back simply reuses one of the existing wood textures in the game.
error: a painting's wooden back simply reuses one of the existing wood textures in the game
correction: Um, actually, a painting's back matches none of the game's wood types. It uses its own plank-style texture with a yellowish tint similar to a chest, and it always has.
title: Minecraft

author: By Yogsy
phrase_text: In House MD, the titular character Gregory House cycles through many residents. One resident was Amber Volakis, who despite no longer being an employee in the Princeton Plainsboro diagnostics department, returns to the show as the girlfriend of James Wilson before she passes away as a result of taking Zanamivir, a flu medication.
error: she passes away as a result of taking Zanamivir, a flu medication.
correction: Um, actually, Amber does not die from Zanamivir. She takes amantadine, an antiviral flu drug, and the bus crash leaves her kidneys unable to filter it out, causing fatal toxicity.
title: House

author: By Yogsy
phrase_text: There are 177 episodes of "House MD," following Gregory House, head of the diagnostics department at Princeton Plainsboro Teaching Hospital, and his team. A running joke is that House has never diagnosed a case of lupus, spawning the popular "it's never lupus" meme. However, House did diagnose lupus one time in season 4, episode 14, "Living the Dream," when a celebrity that House likes comes down with the disease.
error: season 4, episode 14, "Living the Dream," when a celebrity that House likes comes down with the disease.
correction: Um, actually, that was not the lupus case. House's only lupus diagnosis came in season 4, episode 8, "You Don't Want To Know," where the patient is an illusionist treated by fellowship candidates Kutner and Cole.
title: House MD

author: By QzMajor
phrase_text: The 2012 Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles series features many mutant villains alongside its human and alien foes. Bebop and Rocksteady are thieves mutated into a rhinoceros and warthog, Dogpound (later Rahzar) and Fishface were the humans Chris Bradford and Xever Montes before their mutations, and Karai - Shredder's biological daughter - was mutated into a snake.
error: Karai - Shredder's biological daughter - was mutated into a snake
correction: Um, actually, Karai is not Shredder's biological daughter. She was born Hamato Miwa, the daughter of Hamato Yoshi (Splinter), and was kidnapped as an infant by Oroku Saki - who raised her as his own out of revenge.
title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles

author: By DaxAttacks
phrase_text: Sernuks are graceful deer-like creatures that symbolize honor, tradition, and longevity in the world of Palia. Despite being accidentally introduced to the Kilima ecosystem by Kenli - who thought they'd make good pets - The Order has happily accepted them, and now even breeds its own "Proudhorned Sernuk" to pull their carriages.
error: accidentally introduced to the Kilima ecosystem by Kenli
correction: Um, actually, Sernuks are native to Kilima and were never introduced by anyone. The creature Kenli accidentally unleashed on the region - roughly 20 years ago, after they escaped captivity as pets - was the invasive Chapaa.
title: Palia

author: By darjella
phrase_text: In the video game Palia, humans are a legendary race that mysteriously went extinct thousands of years ago. As the player, you are the first human to be seen since then when you are located at the Phoenix Shrine by the archaeologist, Jina.
error: you are the first human to be seen since then
correction: Um, actually, you are just one of many reemerging humans. Palia is an MMO, and canonically every player is a human who has re-emerged - humans have begun appearing all over the world, not just you.
title: Palia

author: By Dennish
phrase_text: "Monster Hunter: World" is a video game developed and published by the company Bandai Namco. It has been widely debated whether it counts as a JRPG or an action RPG - while it shares some traits with JRPGs, it lacks the strong narrative focus and turn-based combat of titles like "Dragon Quest," "Yakuza: Like a Dragon" and "Persona." Instead, it centers on real-time combat and gear-based progression.
error: developed and published by the company Bandai Namco
correction: Um, actually, Bandai Namco had nothing to do with it. "Monster Hunter: World" was developed and published by Capcom, for whom it became the best-selling game in the company's history.
title: Monster Hunter: World

author: By Memealicious
phrase_text: In the original 1989 run of "Quantum Leap," Scott Bakula plays Dr. Sam Beckett, a scientific prodigy who studies string theory. In an experiment into time travel, he gains the ability for his consciousness to travel to any point in time. He cannot control where he goes and can only transfer into the bodies of other people. Over his adventures he ends up as a Black man in the 1950s South, a person with Down syndrome, and a transgender escort.
error: gains the ability for his consciousness to travel to any point in time
correction: Um, actually, Sam can only leap within his own lifetime - roughly 1953 to 1989. Traveling to any point in history is a power reserved for Dr. Ben Song, the lead of the 2022 reboot.
title: Quantum Leap

author: By Memealicious
phrase_text: The Pixar movie "Finding Nemo" has a large scientific inaccuracy. The False Ocellaris Clownfish, which Marlin is based on, is a protogynous hermaphrodite. This means that since Nemo's mother died, Marlin should have biologically changed into a female.
error: protogynous hermaphrodite
correction: Um, actually, they are not protogynous. Clownfish are protandrous hermaphrodites - they begin life as males and become female, so after his mate died Marlin should have changed into a female.
title: Finding Nemo

author: By Memealicious
phrase_text: In the Fallout series, Vault-Tec is the company that produces the vaults to preserve humanity after a nuclear war. However, most of these vaults were actually experiments on the human psyche, such as vaults pumped with hallucinogenic drugs, a vault with a man and a box of puppets, a vault with 999 men and one woman, a vault with 999 women and one man, and a vault where they elect a human sacrifice. The only vault without an experiment was Vault 101, seen in Fallout 3.
error: The only vault without an experiment was Vault 101
correction: Um, actually, Vault 101 was also an experiment. It was deliberately designed to never open, in order to study the role of the Overseer in a vault that stayed sealed indefinitely.
title: Fallout

author: By Memealicious
phrase_text: In Douglas Adams' Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy, Arthur Dent and Ford Prefect are taken aboard a Vogon ship. Vogons are known as the bureaucrats of the universe, and they torture captives with poetry - Vogon poetry is the worst poetry in the universe. The pair are subjected to it before being thrown out of an airlock, only to be saved by the Infinite Improbability Drive of the Heart of Gold.
error: the worst poetry in the universe
correction: Um, actually, Vogon poetry is only the third worst in the universe. The second worst belongs to the Azgoths of Kria, and the very worst was Paula Nancy Millstone Jennings of Sussex, destroyed when Earth was demolished.
title: Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy

author: By Memealicious
phrase_text: In the Smiling Friends episode "Who Violently Murdered Simon S. Salty", there is a character named Grease that was originally meant to be played by the internet lolcow Christine Weston Chandler. However, due to their criminal actions, Christine was unable to play the character. It was then played by Harry Partridge doing an impression of Christine.
error: due to their criminal actions
correction: Um, actually, that wasn't the reason - those negotiations predated her scandal. The role fell through because the show had already blown its cameo budget and feared Chris would leak the surprise.
title: Smiling Friends

author: By mantechcc
phrase_text: "Fullmetal Alchemist" (2003) and "Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood" (2009) both adapt the manga, but the 2003 version diverges partway through with its own story and ending. It leans into the emotional weight of human transmutation and loss, introducing anime-original characters such as Nina, Dante, and Lyra.
error: such as Nina, Dante, and Lyra
correction: Um, actually, Nina Tucker is not exclusive to the 2003 anime. She appears in the manga, the 2003 series, and 2009's "Brotherhood" alike - only Dante and Lyra are genuinely original to the 2003 adaptation.
title: Fullmetal Alchemist

author: By mantechcc
phrase_text: Homunculi are alchemically created humanoids in the Fullmetal Alchemist universe. Fullmetal Alchemist (2003), Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood (2009), and the manga all feature the same seven homunculi, each named after one of the seven deadly sins.
error: all feature the same seven homunculi
correction: Um, actually, the 2003 anime differs sharply. There, King Bradley is Pride rather than Wrath, and both Sloth and Wrath are entirely different beings - failed transmutations of the Elrics' mother and Izumi's son.
title: Fullmetal Alchemist

author: Fan Submitted
phrase_text: In Exploding Kittens, players try to avoid drawing the Exploding Kitten using their ability cards, such as See the Future, Attack, Favor, Skip, and most importantly, Defuse. Some card combinations can also help, like two-of-a-kind, three-of-a-kind, and five-of-a-kind.
error: five-of-a-kind
correction: Um, actually, there is no five-of-a-kind combo. The five-card combo requires five cards of different types, which then lets you take any single card from the discard pile.
title: Exploding Kittens

author: Fan Submitted
phrase_text: The first trilogy of the "Ace Attorney" series follows defense attorney Phoenix Wright as he takes on courtroom cases, most of them involving clients accused of murder. A recurring hallmark across these three games is that every client Phoenix defends ultimately turns out to be innocent, with the true culprit exposed before the trial ends.
error: every client Phoenix defends ultimately turns out to be innocent
correction: Um, actually, there is one glaring exception. In "Justice for All," the second game, the final case "Farewell, My Turnabout" forces Phoenix to defend Matt Engarde - who is genuinely guilty of hiring the assassin Shelly de Killer.
title: Ace Attorney

author: By RubyBlue42
phrase_text: In the 2006 film "Idiocracy", average man Joe is frozen as part of a military experiment, and awakens 500 years later to discover that average intelligence has plummeted and humans are now all crude and moronic. After taking an IQ test in prison, Joe is eventually appointed Secretary of Agriculture by President Dwayne Elizondo Mountain Dew Herbert Camacho, and must improve crop yields nation-wide, or face imprisonment.
error: appointed Secretary of Agriculture
correction: Um, actually, Joe is appointed Secretary of the Interior, not Agriculture. President Camacho still tasks him with fixing the nation's failing crop yields within a week or face prison.
title: Idiocracy

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In "Pokemon Red", "Blue" and "Yellow", most Gym Leaders specialise in a single type. Lt. Surge uses Electric types, Koga uses Poison types and Blaine uses Fire types. The final Gym Leader, Giovanni, is the exception - he fields a mixture of types rather than committing to one.
error: he fields a mixture of types rather than committing to one
correction: Um, actually, Giovanni is not a mixed-type Leader. As the Viridian City Gym Leader he specialises in Ground types, using Pokemon like Rhyhorn, Dugtrio and Nidoking.
title: Pokemon

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: The "Monkey Island" series follows Guybrush Threepwood as he struggles to become the most notorious pirate in the Caribbean. The second game in the series, "The Secret of Monkey Island", teases a mysterious secret that the games would go on to dangle in front of players for decades without ever fully resolving.
error: The second game in the series, "The Secret of Monkey Island"
correction: Um, actually, "The Secret of Monkey Island" is the first game in the series, released in 1990. The second game is "Monkey Island 2: LeChuck's Revenge".
title: Monkey Island

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In the opening episode of "Avatar: The Last Airbender", the young Avatar Aang is discovered frozen inside an iceberg near the North Pole. He and his sky bison Appa are found by siblings Katara and Sokka, whose escapades soon draw the attention of the exiled Prince Zuko of the Fire Nation, tasked with capturing the Avatar to restore his honour.
error: frozen inside an iceberg near the North Pole
correction: Um, actually, Aang is frozen near the South Pole, not the North. Katara and Sokka are members of the Southern Water Tribe; the Northern Water Tribe is a separate community Aang visits later.
title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In "Rocket League", scoring in certain styles awards a named goal type and bonus points toward a player's score. These include aerial, backwards, bicycle, long, tortoise, pool, overtime and swish.
error: tortoise
correction: Um, actually, there is no 'tortoise' goal. The goal scored while inverted on your car's roof is called a turtle.
title: Rocket League

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In "Dark Souls" the player takes the role of the Chosen Undead and is guided to ring the two Bells of Awakening to gain access to Anor Londo through Sen's Fortress. One bell sits atop the Undead Church beyond the Bell Gargoyles, and ringing it then unlocks the second bell below Blighttown, reached after defeating Chaos Witch Quelaag.
error: ringing it then unlocks the second bell below Blighttown
correction: Um, actually, ringing one bell doesn't unlock the other. Both Bells of Awakening are accessible from the start and can be rung in either order.
title: Dark Souls

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In "Initial D", Takumi Fujiwara is a student working at a gas station with his friend Itsuki. Recruited by Iketani of the Akina SpeedStars, Takumi wins his first race against the RedSuns' leader Ryosuke Takahashi and his FC RX-7, using a dangerous gutter-run technique.
error: against the RedSuns' leader Ryosuke Takahashi and his FC RX-7
correction: Um, actually, Takumi's first race is against Keisuke Takahashi, not the RedSuns' leader Ryosuke. Keisuke drives an FD RX-7; it is Ryosuke who drives the FC.
title: Initial D

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In the first "BioShock", the protagonist Jack survives a plane crash near a mysterious lighthouse, which lets him descend by bathysphere to the undersea city of Rapture. Later it is revealed that Jack is the son of Rapture's founder, Andrew Ryan, whom he is ultimately forced to kill.
error: Jack survives a plane crash near a mysterious lighthouse
correction: Um, actually, Jack isn't a crash victim. Under the hypnotic trigger "Would you kindly", he hijacks the plane himself and deliberately crashes it beside the lighthouse.
title: BioShock

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In "South Park", Eric Cartman is known for his manipulative, often villainous streak. One of his most infamous schemes comes in the episode "Scott Tenorman Must Die", where he tricks Scott into eating chili secretly made from Scott's pet pony - widely regarded as one of the darkest moments in the series.
error: chili secretly made from Scott's pet pony
correction: Um, actually, the chili isn't made from the pony. Cartman has Scott's parents killed and grinds them into the chili; the pony was just bait in an earlier scheme to lull Scott.
title: South Park

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In "Monster Hunter", the Rathalos is an icon of the series and its self-styled "King of the Skies" - a large, fire-breathing wyvern. In "Monster Hunter: World" it roams and hunts primarily in the Ancient Forest, as well as the Coral Highlands alongside the Legiana and Pink Rathian.
error: as well as the Coral Highlands
correction: Um, actually, Rathalos does not inhabit the Coral Highlands. That region is Legiana's territory; Rathalos is the apex monster of the Ancient Forest.
title: Monster Hunter

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In "Hogwarts Legacy" players control a fifth-year student at Hogwarts in the late 1800s. No characters from the original film series appear in the game, though familiar family names such as Weasley, Black and Diggory turn up across its characters and quests.
error: No characters from the original film series appear in the game
correction: Um, actually, at least one does. Nearly Headless Nick, the Gryffindor house ghost from the films, appears in the game and even leads a Gryffindor-exclusive quest.
title: Hogwarts Legacy

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In "The Simpsons", the family's home at 742 Evergreen Terrace has been drawn both light pink and light brown across different episodes and seasons. The Flanders family live next door on one side, while the owners of the house on the other side are largely inconsistent and unimportant - the exception being Sideshow Bob, who briefly owned the property.
error: at 742 Evergreen Terrace
correction: Um, actually, the address is a running gag. Over the years the house has also been given numbers such as 94, 1094, 55 and 723 Evergreen Terrace, and even 430 Spalding Way.
title: The Simpsons

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In "Wipeout 2048", the inaugural F3600 Anti-Gravity Racing League season commences in Nova State City. The four original teams from the first "Wipeout" - Feisar, AG Systems, Qirex and Auricom - all take part, alongside Pir-hana, a precursor to the Piranha team.
error: the inaugural F3600 Anti-Gravity Racing League season
correction: Um, actually, the 2048 season is the Anti-Gravity Racing Championship, not the F3600 League. The F3600 Anti-Gravity Racing League only replaced it in 2052.
title: Wipeout

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: The children's animated show "Bluey" follows a six-year-old Blue Heeler puppy and her family: dad Bandit, mum Chilli and little sister Bingo. Her extended family includes aunts and uncles Radley, Frisky, Brandy, Stripe and Trixie; cousins Muffin and Socks; and grandparents Mort, Kate, Bob and Christine.
error: grandparents Mort, Kate, Bob and Christine
correction: Um, actually, Bluey's maternal grandmother is never named on the show. "Kate" is actually the name of her voice actress, Kate Miller-Heidke, not the character.
title: Bluey

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In "Sabriel", the title character is stalked by a Mordicant, a powerful Dead creature. She outruns it and reaches the safety of Abhorsen's House, set on an island in the middle of a river - a refuge that works because the Dead cannot cross any body of water.
error: the Dead cannot cross any body of water
correction: Um, actually, the Dead can cross still or shallow water. What they cannot cross is fast, deep running water, which is exactly what protects Abhorsen's House on its river island.
title: The Old Kingdom

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In "Ratchet & Clank: Tools of Destruction", Ratchet travels across many planets to stop the villainous Dr. N. Gin from using the newly found Dimensionator. Along the way he crosses paths with his old rival Captain Qwark, who eventually becomes an ally.
error: the villainous Dr. N. Gin
correction: Um, actually, Dr. N. Gin isn't a Ratchet & Clank villain - he's from the Crash Bandicoot series. The antagonist of Tools of Destruction is Emperor Percival Tachyon.
title: Ratchet & Clank

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In "Hazbin Hotel", Charlie, the princess of Hell, is determined to rehabilitate demons and offer them redemption through her hotel. She is aided by Alastor, a powerful radio demon who genuinely believes in Charlie's mission of redemption, and Vaggie, her girlfriend, who is supportive but often skeptical of Alastor's true intentions.
error: who genuinely believes in Charlie's mission of redemption
correction: Um, actually, Alastor makes clear he has no faith in redemption at all. He backs the hotel purely for his own entertainment and leverage, expecting the demons to try and fail.
title: Hazbin Hotel

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In Disney's "Hercules", the young hero is trained by the satyr Philoctetes. After his training they travel to Athens, meeting Megara on the way and saving her from the centaur Nessus. There, Hades has Pain and Panic lure Hercules into a fight with the Hydra, which he narrowly wins, earning the crowd's adoration.
error: they travel to Athens
correction: Um, actually, Hercules proves himself in Thebes, not Athens. The Hydra fight and his rise to fame all take place in "the Big Olive", Thebes.
title: Hercules

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In "The Mummy", Imhotep is cursed and buried alive with flesh-eating scarabs as punishment for his affair with the Pharaoh's mistress, Anck-su-namun. Over 3,000 years later, Evelyn reads aloud from the Book of the Dead and accidentally awakens the mummified priest.
error: as punishment for his affair with the Pharaoh's mistress, Anck-su-namun
correction: Um, actually, the affair itself isn't what damns him. Imhotep and Anck-su-namun murder Pharaoh Seti I when he catches them, and it is that killing - and the attempt to resurrect her - that earns him the Hom-Dai curse.
title: The Mummy

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In "The Last of Us", Joel and Ellie meet several groups of survivors, including the Fireflies and the cannibalistic group led by David. David's people capture Ellie, but she escapes and reunites with Joel, who had just fought his way through a group of infected to reach her.
error: who had just fought his way through a group of infected to reach her
correction: Um, actually, Joel isn't fighting infected in that stretch. He captures and tortures two of David's men to force out Ellie's location before going after her.
title: The Last of Us

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: Like most Pixar films, "Cars" is full of Easter eggs, including the Pizza Planet truck and the A113 code. Several racers' numbers are references too: Strip Weathers wears 43 as a nod to Richard Petty, Chick Hicks wears 86 for Pixar's founding year, and Lightning McQueen sports 95 to mark the year Disney acquired Pixar.
error: 95 to mark the year Disney acquired Pixar
correction: Um, actually, McQueen's 95 refers to 1995, the year "Toy Story" - Pixar's first feature film - was released. Disney didn't acquire Pixar until 2006.
title: Cars

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: The PlayStation 3, released in 2006, was the first console with a built-in Blu-ray player, helping cement Blu-ray as the dominant HD format. It could also play PlayStation 2 games, letting all PS3 owners enjoy their old PS2 titles on the new system without any issues.
error: letting all PS3 owners enjoy their old PS2 titles on the new system without any issues
correction: Um, actually, only the earliest PS3 models were backward compatible with PS2 games. Later revisions dropped the feature entirely, so most PS3 owners couldn't play PS2 discs.
title: PlayStation

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In "Stardew Valley" players can raise farm animals including cows, chickens, sheep, pigs, ostriches, ducks and dinosaurs. The Auto-Grabber, sold at Marnie's Ranch once you reach Farming Level 10, automatically collects milk, eggs, wool, truffles and more from your animals.
error: automatically collects milk, eggs, wool, truffles and more
correction: Um, actually, the Auto-Grabber can't collect truffles. It only gathers products left inside a barn or coop, whereas pigs dig up truffles outside on the farm.
title: Stardew Valley

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In FromSoftware's "Bloodborne", players take the role of the Hunter in a nightmare world of eldritch horrors. The game begins in Old Yharnam, a district overrun by beasts, before the Hunter ventures out to surrounding areas such as the Forbidden Woods, Byrgenwerth and Cainhurst Castle.
error: The game begins in Old Yharnam
correction: Um, actually, the game opens in Central Yharnam, not Old Yharnam. Old Yharnam is a separate, abandoned district you can reach a little later.
title: Bloodborne

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In "Civilization VI" players can pursue five different win conditions. The base game offers Science, Culture, Domination and Religion victories, while the Gathering Storm expansion added a Diplomatic victory.
error: five different win conditions
correction: Um, actually, there's a sixth. If no one has won by the turn limit, the game is decided by a Score victory, awarded to the highest-scoring civilization.
title: Civilization VI

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: Peter Jackson's Hobbit trilogy makes several changes to the source material. Inventing Tauriel adds a female lead, and the expanded role of Radagast the Brown shows more of the wizards of Middle-earth. The films also rework the timeline by making Azog the Defiler a main villain, when in the books he appears far later in Middle-earth history.
error: when in the books he appears far later in Middle-earth history
correction: Um, actually, in the books Azog appears far earlier, not later. He was beheaded by Dain Ironfoot at the Battle of Azanulbizar, decades before the events of "The Hobbit".
title: The Hobbit

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: Over the years many licensed properties have received Lego video game adaptations. The long list includes Star Wars, Harry Potter, The Lord of the Rings, Horizon, Minecraft, The Incredibles, The Avengers and Jurassic World.
error: Minecraft
correction: Um, actually, there has never been a Lego Minecraft video game. Lego has produced plenty of Minecraft building sets, but no game - unlike Horizon, which did get "Lego Horizon Adventures".
title: Lego Games

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In "Attack on Titan", Eren Jaeger inherits the power of the Attack Titan from his father Grisha, becoming one of the nine Titan Shifters able to change between human and Titan form. Early on, few of the nine are known beyond the Colossal and Armoured Titans who attacked Shiganshina.
error: becoming one of the nine Titan Shifters
correction: Um, actually, there are only eight shifters at this point. Eren unknowingly inherits the Founding Titan from Grisha as well, so one person holds two of the Nine Titans.
title: Attack on Titan

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: The Marvel Cinematic Universe is split into Phases. Phase 1 began with "Iron Man" in 2008 and culminated in "The Avengers" in 2012. Phase 3 built the Infinity Saga to its climax, with "Infinity War" and "Endgame" closing out the phase in 2018 and 2019. Phases 4 and 5 form the Multiverse Saga, with Phase 5 ending on "Thunderbolts" in May 2025.
error: with "Infinity War" and "Endgame" closing out the phase in 2018 and 2019
correction: Um, actually, Endgame didn't close Phase 3. "Spider-Man: Far From Home" was the final Phase 3 film, and "Ant-Man and the Wasp" was released between "Infinity War" and "Endgame".
title: Marvel Cinematic Universe

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: "Zoo Tycoon" featured plenty of amusing cheats for unlocking extra animals. Renaming an exhibit "Xanadu" unlocked the Unicorn, and before the Dinosaur Digs pack a Triceratops could be adopted by renaming an exhibit "Cretaceous Corral". The Loch Ness Monster could likewise be summoned by placing a series of floating logs in a tank named "Loch Ness".
error: The Loch Ness Monster could likewise be summoned by placing a series of floating logs in a tank named "Loch Ness"
correction: Um, actually, there's no floating-log trick. The Loch Ness Monster - like Bigfoot - was simply a directly adoptable animal added by the Endangered Species Theme Pack.
title: Zoo Tycoon

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: "The Mandalorian" follows Din Djarin roaming the galaxy as a bounty hunter aboard his ship, the Razor Crest. After an attempted assault on Moff Gideon's light cruiser in orbit above Tython, the Razor Crest is destroyed. Din later turns to Peli Motto on Tatooine, whose refurbished Naboo N-1 starfighter becomes his replacement.
error: After an attempted assault on Moff Gideon's light cruiser in orbit above Tython, the Razor Crest is destroyed
correction: Um, actually, the ship wasn't destroyed while attacking the cruiser. The Razor Crest was sitting on the ground on Tython when Gideon's cruiser wiped it out with a single orbital blast as Grogu was taken.
title: The Mandalorian

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: James Cameron's "Avatar" is set in the 22nd century, as humans colonise the lush moon Pandora to mine its valuable unobtanium. On release it became the highest-grossing film of all time, a title it later lost to "Avengers: Endgame", which holds the position to this day. The sequel, "Avatar: The Way of Water", arrived in 2022.
error: which holds the position to this day
correction: Um, actually, Endgame doesn't still hold the record. "Avatar" reclaimed the all-time box-office crown in March 2021 following a re-release in China.
title: Avatar

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: The James Bond films are full of gadgets from Q Branch. The first on-screen gadget, in "From Russia with Love", was a briefcase with throwing knives, a rifle and a tear-gas booby trap. Later came the "Thunderball" jetpack, an Ericsson phone that let Bond remotely drive his BMW in "Licence to Kill", and a laser-cutter Omega watch in "Die Another Day".
error: an Ericsson phone that let Bond remotely drive his BMW in "Licence to Kill"
correction: Um, actually, the phone-driven BMW was in "Tomorrow Never Dies". That's a Pierce Brosnan film - "Licence to Kill" was Timothy Dalton's, and had no such gadget.
title: James Bond

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: Sherlock Holmes is one of the most adapted characters in fiction. Arthur Conan Doyle's original stories were mostly short-story collections, but he also wrote five novels: "A Study in Scarlet", "The Sign of the Four", "The Hound of the Baskervilles", "The Valley of Fear" and "The Final Problem".
error: five novels: "A Study in Scarlet", "The Sign of the Four", "The Hound of the Baskervilles", "The Valley of Fear" and "The Final Problem"
correction: Um, actually, there are only four Holmes novels. "The Final Problem" is a short story - the one in which Holmes and Moriarty apparently plunge to their deaths at the Reichenbach Falls.
title: Sherlock Holmes

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: At WrestleMania 18 in Toronto, Canada, Vince McMahon and Shawn Michaels conspired to take the belt off WWF Champion Bret Hart in what became known as the Montreal Screwjob. Michaels locked Hart in his own finisher, the Sharpshooter, and the referee called for the bell, declaring Michaels the winner even though Hart never submitted.
error: At WrestleMania 18 in Toronto, Canada
correction: Um, actually, the Montreal Screwjob happened at the 1997 Survivor Series in Montreal, not WrestleMania. WrestleMania 18 was a separate event, held in Toronto in 2002.
title: WWE

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: Pokemon has a long tradition of remaking older games and tweaking their names. The first time was the Generation 3 remakes of the Generation 1 titles "Red" and "Blue", released as "Pokemon Fire Red" and "Pokemon Water Blue".
error: "Pokemon Fire Red" and "Pokemon Water Blue"
correction: Um, actually, the remakes were "Pokemon FireRed" and "LeafGreen". There has never been a "Water Blue" version.
title: Pokemon

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: The best-known ship in "The Matrix" is Morpheus's Nebuchadnezzar. Early in "The Matrix Reloaded", Commander Lock calls an emergency gathering of Zion's hovercraft fleet to address the sentinel army digging its way down towards the city - intelligence brought back by Captain Thaddeus of the Osiris, who presents it to the fleet.
error: intelligence brought back by Captain Thaddeus of the Osiris, who presents it to the fleet
correction: Um, actually, Thaddeus can't present anything - he and the Osiris were destroyed getting that warning to Zion, as shown in "The Animatrix". The crew merely managed to drop off the data before dying.
title: The Matrix

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: The board game "Root" has received several expansions adding factions and mechanics. The Riverfolk Expansion added the Riverfolk Company and Lizard Cult, and the Marauder Expansion added the Lord of the Hundreds and Keepers in Iron plus the hirelings mechanic. The Clockwork Expansion lets you play against bot versions of the four base-game factions as well as those from the Riverfolk Expansion.
error: as well as those from the Riverfolk Expansion
correction: Um, actually, the Clockwork Expansion only added bots for the four base-game factions - the Marquise, Eyrie, Woodland Alliance and Vagabond. It didn't include the Riverfolk Expansion factions.
title: Root

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In "Death Note", Light Yagami finds the titular notebook after Ryuk drops it into the human world out of boredom. Later, Misa Amane gains her own Death Note from a shinigami named Rem. After L deduces Misa is the second Kira and has her detained, Rem threatens to kill Ryuk unless Light finds a way to save her.
error: Rem threatens to kill Ryuk unless Light finds a way to save her
correction: Um, actually, Rem threatens to kill Light, not Ryuk. Rem is devoted to Misa and warns that she will end Light's life if Misa comes to harm.
title: Death Note

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: The first "Age of Empires" let players advance a civilisation from the Stone Age to the Iron Age. Its sequel, "Age of Empires II: The Conquerors", took European, Asian and Middle Eastern civilisations from the Dark Age to the Imperial Age. The third game was set between 1421 and 1850 and featured only European civilisations until its expansions.
error: "Age of Empires II: The Conquerors"
correction: Um, actually, the sequel is "Age of Empires II: The Age of Kings". "The Conquerors" was its expansion, adding civilisations such as the Aztecs, Maya, Spanish, Huns and Koreans.
title: Age of Empires

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In the "Pokemon" anime, Ash's first Pokemon is the initially uncooperative Pikachu. On the way to Viridian City, Ash wins Pikachu's friendship by shielding him from a flock of wild, angry Fearow, then grabs Misty's bike and races off with Pikachu in the basket, heading for the Pokemon Centre.
error: a flock of wild, angry Fearow
correction: Um, actually, the flock that attacks them is made up of Spearow, not the evolved Fearow. A lone Fearow only turns up in later episodes.
title: Pokemon

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In the second act of the 11-time Tony-winning musical "Hamilton", several Act 1 actors are double-cast in new roles. The actor who played John Laurens becomes Philip Hamilton, the Marquis de Lafayette becomes Thomas Jefferson, Hercules Mulligan becomes John Adams, and Peggy Schuyler becomes Maria Reynolds.
error: Hercules Mulligan becomes John Adams
correction: Um, actually, the actor who played Hercules Mulligan returns as James Madison, not John Adams. Adams is frequently name-dropped but never actually appears on stage.
title: Hamilton

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: The Nintendo Game Boy went through several iterations across its lifespan. Starting with the Game Boy in 1989, it was superseded by the Game Boy Color in 1998. The pace of evolution then increased, with the Game Boy Advance launching in 2001. With a new form factor, smaller cartridges and shoulder buttons, the Advance was the first in the line to offer a backlit screen. Two years later the Game Boy Advance SP added a clamshell folding design, and in 2005 the Game Boy Micro was the last of the line before the Nintendo DS took over.
error: the Advance was the first in the line to offer a backlit screen
correction: Um, actually, the Advance had no backlight at all - its screen was unlit and reflective. The first backlit Game Boy was the AGS-101 revision of the Game Boy Advance SP in 2005.
title: Game Boy

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: SimCity 4 lets players build large, densely populated cities. To grow, you must zone areas so Sims move in and build. Residential, Commercial and Industrial zones each come in three tiers, offering different costs, building densities and the types of business that move in. Agriculture is the exception - it is a separate zone type that only ever offers a single tier.
error: it is a separate zone type that only ever offers a single tier
correction: Um, actually, agriculture is not a separate zone type. It is simply the lowest-density tier of Industrial zoning, taking the place of low-density factories.
title: SimCity

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: Grey's Anatomy is an extremely long-running medical drama, which aired its 21st season last year. Over its long lifespan the cast has seen many changes. Only three cast members have appeared in all 21 seasons: Ellen Pompeo as the titular Meredith Grey, Chandra Wilson as Miranda Webber and James Pickens Jr. as Richard Bailey.
error: Chandra Wilson as Miranda Webber and James Pickens Jr. as Richard Bailey
correction: Um, actually, the surnames are swapped. Chandra Wilson plays Miranda Bailey, and James Pickens Jr. plays Richard Webber.
title: Grey's Anatomy

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: The Android operating system once had a long tradition of confectionery and dessert-based public release names, running in alphabetical order. It started with Android 1.5, named Cupcake, and the convention was retired with the launch of Android 10 in 2019. In the meantime there were many amusingly named versions, including Gingerbread, Honeycomb, Ice Cream Sandwich, KitKat, Marshmallow, Oreo and Vanilla Ice Cream.
error: Oreo and Vanilla Ice Cream
correction: Um, actually, Vanilla Ice Cream was never a public Android name. It is the internal codename for Android 15, which released long after public dessert names were dropped.
title: Android

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: The Marvel Cinematic Universe has seen a lot of success, though a few flops have appeared among its films. The Thor films have had mixed critical acclaim: the first, Thor, achieved moderate success, while its sequel, Thor 2: The Dark World, was less well received. The series was revived critically by Thor: Ragnarok in 2017, directed by Taika Waititi, while his follow-up, Thor: Love and Thunder, was much less enjoyed.
error: Thor 2: The Dark World
correction: Um, actually, the second Thor film isn't called 'Thor 2'. Its official title is simply 'Thor: The Dark World'.
title: Thor

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In Disney's Aladdin, the Genie grants whoever rubs his lamp three wishes. Aladdin's first wish frees himself, Abu, the Genie and the carpet from the Cave of Wonders. His second wish is to become a prince so he has a chance with Jasmine, while his third wish is more altruistic - he wishes for the Genie's freedom.
error: Aladdin's first wish frees himself, Abu, the Genie and the carpet from the Cave of Wonders.
correction: Um, actually, that wasn't a wish. Aladdin tricks the Genie into getting them out of the cave without officially wishing for it, so he still has all three wishes afterwards.
title: Aladdin

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: Space Jam, the 1996 film in which Michael Jordan meets the Looney Tunes, builds to a basketball match between the Tune Squad and the Monstars. The Monstars dominate the first half using the powers they stole, crushing the Tune Squad's morale. At halftime, Bugs and Jordan rally the team by convincing them that the Monstars' abilities are fading and that cartoon physics can beat them. Jordan then stretches his arm to slam-dunk and win the game.
error: convincing them that the Monstars' abilities are fading and that cartoon physics can beat them
correction: Um, actually, that isn't the halftime ploy. Bugs and Jordan hand the team a bottle of water labelled 'Michael's Secret Stuff', a placebo they claim grants Monstar-like powers.
title: Space Jam

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: Angry Birds' flock of launchable avians comes in a variety of colours and abilities. Red, the series' protagonist, has no special power. Chuck, the yellow bird, is triangular and can dash at great speed. Bomb, the large black bird, explodes on impact with structures or pigs. Matilda, the white bird, can drop explosive eggs, and Hal, the green bird, can change direction in mid-flight.
error: explodes on impact with structures or pigs
correction: Um, actually, Bomb doesn't explode on impact. He detonates when the player taps the screen, or automatically after a short delay.
title: Angry Birds

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: Wii Sports was a major factor in the Wii's success. It featured five playable sports. Tennis allowed up to four players in doubles, with computer-controlled movement; baseball used the Wii Remote to swing, while fielding was handled by AI. Bowling allowed a full 10-frame game, golf offered a nine-hole round, and boxing used two Wii Remotes per player to track both hands.
error: boxing used two Wii Remotes per player to track both hands
correction: Um, actually, boxing wasn't played with two Wii Remotes. Each player used one Wii Remote plus the Nunchuk, one controller for each hand.
title: Wii Sports

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: A popular alternative way to play the Pokemon games is the Nuzlocke challenge. While variations abound, a standard Nuzlocke's core rules require you to catch only the first wild Pokemon encountered in each area (unless it's a duplicate), to keep every Pokemon at or below the next Gym Leader or Elite Four member's highest level, and to treat any Pokemon that faints as dead and unusable.
error: to keep every Pokemon at or below the next Gym Leader or Elite Four member's highest level,
correction: Um, actually, the level cap isn't a core rule. A standard Nuzlocke has just two: catch the first Pokemon in each area, and treat fainted Pokemon as dead. Level caps are a common optional add-on.
title: Pokémon

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: Critical Role's spherical world of Exandria is made up of five continents: Tal'Dorei (formerly Gwessar), Issylra in the north, Marquet in the south, Wildemount (the largest) and the Shattered Teeth, formerly Cathmoira during the Age of Arcanum.
error: the Shattered Teeth, formerly Cathmoira during the Age of Arcanum
correction: Um, actually, the Shattered Teeth was previously the continent of Domunas. Cathmoira was a city on that continent, not its former name.
title: Critical Role

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: The main Call of Duty series is made up of 21 games. Only the first four games are numbered, with the rest largely grouped into sub-series such as Black Ops and Modern Warfare. These have been developed by a range of studios, including Infinity Ward, Treyarch and Sledgehammer Games.
error: Only the first four games are numbered
correction: Um, actually, plenty of later games are numbered too. Titles like Modern Warfare 2, Modern Warfare 3 and Black Ops 2 through 6 all carry numbers.
title: Call of Duty

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In Pac-Man the four ghosts - Blinky, Pinky, Inky and Clyde - each have their own behaviour. Blinky gives direct chase, Pinky and Inky try to get in front of Pac-Man to corner him, and Clyde switches between chasing and fleeing. In the four corners of the maze are power pellets which, when eaten, let Pac-Man eat the ghosts and reroll their behaviour pattern.
error: reroll their behaviour pattern
correction: Um, actually, eating a ghost doesn't change its behaviour. It just returns to the house as a pair of eyes and then resumes its usual chase or scatter pattern.
title: Pac-Man

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: Mickey Mouse made his first appearance in 1928's Steamboat Willie. He was created as a replacement for Oswald Rabbit, an earlier cartoon character made by the Disney studio but owned by Universal Pictures. Mickey was originally planned to be called Mortimer Mouse.
error: Oswald Rabbit
correction: Um, actually, the character's name was Oswald the Lucky Rabbit. Disney created Mickey after losing the rights to Oswald, who was owned by Universal.
title: Mickey Mouse

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: Gitaroo Man follows a young boy called U-1. One day he is attacked, and his talking dog Puma transforms and hands him a weapon called the Last Gitaroo, which turns U-1 into the legendary warrior Gitaroo Man. After defeating many enemies sent by Prince Zowie of the Gravillian Empire, U-1 travels to Planet Gitaroo and befriends a girl named Pico, only to discover she is Zowie's gladiator - then uses the power of music to turn her against Zowie.
error: befriends a girl named Pico, only to discover she is Zowie's gladiator
correction: Um, actually, Zowie's gladiator is named Kirah. Pico is the near-identical girl of U-1's dreams back on Earth - the two just look strikingly alike.
title: Gitaroo Man

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In Die Hard, LA police officer John McClane arrives in New York hoping to reconcile with his estranged wife, Holly, at a Christmas party hosted by her employer, the Nakatomi Corporation. During the party a group of German radicals led by Hans Gruber takes everyone but McClane hostage, and John works to bring them down and free the Nakatomi employees.
error: LA police officer John McClane arrives in New York
correction: Um, actually, it's the other way round. McClane is a New York cop who travels to Los Angeles, where Nakatomi Plaza and the Christmas party are located.
title: Die Hard

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: Black Mirror is an anthology series, with many episodes set in technology-adjacent near-future dystopias. The first episode, The National Anthem, depicts the kidnapping of a British royal. In exchange for her safe release, the kidnapper demands that the Prime Minister have sex with a pig on live television. Plans to fake the act are devised, but in the end the PM is left with no option but to comply, and afterwards Princess Susannah is released.
error: and afterwards Princess Susannah is released
correction: Um, actually, Susannah was freed before the broadcast, not after. She was released around half an hour earlier, but nobody noticed because the whole country was watching the PM.
title: Black Mirror

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: The Tamagotchi, first released in Japan in 1996, quickly became one of the biggest toy fads of the late 90s. The egg-shaped capsule had a small LCD screen and two buttons for selecting its various functions. An updated version in 2004, the Tamagotchi Connection, added a third button and an infrared port so multiple Tamagotchis could communicate.
error: two buttons for selecting its various functions
correction: Um, actually, the original Tamagotchi already had three buttons. Every model has had three - the 2004 Connection added infrared, not an extra button.
title: Tamagotchi

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: The original Destiny cast players as Guardians, protectors of the last safe city on Earth, wielding a power called Light to defend it from alien races. These include the Fallen (also known as the Eliksni), the insect-like Hive, the robotic Vex and the militaristic Cabal. The Dark Below expansion also introduced the Taken, corrupted versions of existing enemies.
error: The Dark Below expansion also introduced the Taken
correction: Um, actually, the Taken weren't added in The Dark Below. They were introduced in the following expansion, The Taken King, alongside its villain Oryx.
title: Destiny

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In BBC's Sherlock we meet Holmes' brother Mycroft in the opening episode, A Study in Pink. Mycroft is enigmatic and said to occupy a minor position in the British Government, though Sherlock claims he in fact 'is the British Government'. There is a clear sibling rivalry, and Sherlock's superior deduction skills often let him show up his older brother.
error: Sherlock's superior deduction skills often let him show up his older brother
correction: Um, actually, it's the other way round. Mycroft is the more gifted deducer of the two and consistently outdoes Sherlock when they match wits.
title: Sherlock

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In the Pokemon games, your Pokedex records an entry for every Pokemon you encounter, including a short bio. Some of these bios are unsettling, such as Froslass, said to freeze humans it likes and keep them in its den as decorations, or Drowzee, which prefers to eat the dreams of children because they taste better than adults'.
error: your Pokedex records an entry for every Pokemon you encounter, including a short bio
correction: Um, actually, merely encountering a Pokemon only logs it as 'Seen', with no bio. The full data and description are recorded only once you actually catch it.
title: Pokémon

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: Portal takes place inside the Aperture Science Enrichment Center and follows test subject Chell as she solves puzzles with the Aperture Science Handheld Portal Device. She is guided by an AI called GLaDOS, who promises cake for completing every test chamber. But when GLaDOS tries to kill Chell with live-fire military turrets on completion of the tests, it becomes clear the cake is a lie.
error: GLaDOS tries to kill Chell with live-fire military turrets on completion of the tests
correction: Um, actually, that's not how the tests end. GLaDOS tries to incinerate Chell and floods the room with neurotoxin - turrets are a threat earlier in the chambers, not at the finale.
title: Portal

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: The Metal Gear series has not been released in chronological order, with the games and spin-offs jumping around its fictional timeline. The earliest game chronologically is Metal Gear Solid 3: Snake Eater, set in 1964. The first game released, Metal Gear Solid, takes place in 2005, and the most modern entry is Metal Gear Rising: Revengeance, set in 2018.
error: The first game released, Metal Gear Solid, takes place in 2005
correction: Um, actually, Metal Gear Solid wasn't the first release. That was Metal Gear, launched in 1987 and set in 1995; Metal Gear Solid followed in 1998.
title: Metal Gear

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: Housemarque's PS4 launch title Resogun casts players as voxel-based ships fighting across cylindrical levels. During a level, aliens can be saved from around the arena by killing a set of keepers to release them and then carrying them to a safe point for bonus points.
error: aliens can be saved from around the arena
correction: Um, actually, you're not rescuing aliens - you're rescuing humans. Killing the keepers frees the last humans, whom you then carry to safety for bonus points.
title: Resogun

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In the first Borderlands game, players could choose to play as Brick the Berserker, Lilith the Siren, Mordecai the Hunter, Roland the Soldier or Krieg the Psycho. After arriving on Pandora, the Vault Hunters meet Claptrap and set out to find the pieces of a key needed to open the fabled Vault, which can only be opened once every 200 years.
error: or Krieg the Psycho
correction: Um, actually, Krieg wasn't in the first game. The original four Vault Hunters are Brick, Lilith, Mordecai and Roland - Krieg was a DLC character added to Borderlands 2.
title: Borderlands

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In ancient Greek mythology, the twelve Olympians are the major deities of the pantheon. They are commonly held to be Zeus, Poseidon, Hera, Demeter, Aphrodite, Athena, Artemis, Apollo, Ares, Hades, Hermes and either Hestia or Dionysus.
error: Ares, Hades, Hermes
correction: Um, actually, Hades is not counted among the Olympians - he rules the underworld, away from Olympus. The standard list instead includes Hephaestus, which this one omits.
title: Greek Mythology

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: Critical Role's first campaign sees the party Vox Machina take on the Briarwoods, who have seized Whitestone from the de Rolo family. Percy's pepperbox, built in pursuit of vengeance, carried six names on its barrels: Lord Briarwood, Lady Briarwood, Anna Ripley, Kerrion Stonefell, Professor Anders and Goran Vedmire.
error: Professor Anders and Goran Vedmire
correction: Um, actually, Vedmire was never a name on the List. Only five barrels were inscribed - the two Briarwoods, Ripley, Stonefell and Anders - and the sixth was left blank.
title: Critical Role

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: Quentin Tarantino's Pulp Fiction is told out of chronological order. While the diner scene bookends the film, its last chronological scene has Butch retrieve his gold watch from his apartment after escaping Zed and Maynard's basement. Back at the apartment, Butch kills Vincent after finding him in the bathroom, then rides off on Zed's chopper.
error: its last chronological scene has Butch retrieve his gold watch from his apartment after escaping Zed and Maynard's basement
correction: Um, actually, that order is reversed. Butch gets the watch and kills Vincent first; only afterwards does he run into Marsellus and end up in Zed and Maynard's basement.
title: Pulp Fiction

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In Tony Hawk's Pro Skater 1, 2, 3 and 4, players - as either a pro skater or a created character - get two minutes per level to complete a set of goals such as collecting the letters S-K-A-T-E, hitting score targets, grabbing VHS tapes and smashing objects. In the fifth game, Tony Hawk's Underground, the two-minute limit is gone as the player follows a story from amateur to professional skater.
error: In Tony Hawk's Pro Skater 1, 2, 3 and 4, players - as either a pro skater or a created character - get two minutes per level
correction: Um, actually, the original THPS4 dropped the two-minute timer. It used a free-roam career in which goals were handed out by characters around each level, with no run clock.
title: Tony Hawk's Pro Skater

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: Disneyland Paris first opened in 1992 as Euro Disney Resort. Like the American parks it was based on, it opened with both Big Thunder Mountain and Space Mountain. This Space Mountain was given a Jules Verne steampunk theme and is the only version of the ride to feature inversions and a launch. It has since been revised twice - first to Space Mountain: Mission 2, and later to Hyperspace Mountain with a Star Wars theme.
error: it opened with both Big Thunder Mountain and Space Mountain
correction: Um, actually, the park didn't open with Space Mountain. The ride was added in 1995, three years after opening, in an effort to draw more visitors to the struggling resort.
title: Disneyland Paris

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: For Shrek, Mike Myers replaced Chris Farley, who had been set to voice the character before his death. Myers first recorded all the dialogue in his native American accent, but after seeing a rough cut he asked to re-record the lines with a Scottish accent. The request was approved and the film was reanimated to match, at a cost of around $4 million.
error: his native American accent
correction: Um, actually, Mike Myers is Canadian, not American. He recorded Shrek in his ordinary voice before switching to the now-famous Scottish accent.
title: Shrek

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: The standard UK edition of Monopoly features eight groups of properties, each marked by a colour. At the start of the board, Old Kent Road and Whitechapel make up the brown properties, while just before Go a player can land on both Mayfair and Park Lane in Light Blue.
error: Mayfair and Park Lane in Light Blue
correction: Um, actually, Mayfair and Park Lane are the Dark Blue set. They are the two priciest squares on the standard UK board.
title: Monopoly

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In Skyrim, the player can collect a set of Daedric Artifacts tied to the Daedric Princes, each earned through a Daedric quest. One of the most memorable is the Jabberwock, a staff of Sheogorath, the Prince of Madness, that casts random spells - from total disintegration to turning enemies into wheels of cheese.
error: the Jabberwock, a staff of Sheogorath
correction: Um, actually, the staff is called the Wabbajack. Its name is a playful nod to the Jabberwock, the nonsense creature from Lewis Carroll's poem.
title: Skyrim

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: The Lord of the Rings is presented as a translation of a book originally written in Westron, the common speech of Middle-earth. In that framing, Frodo Baggins' real name is Maura Labingi, while his uncle Bilbo's real name is Bilba Labingi.
error: his uncle Bilbo
correction: Um, actually, Bilbo is Frodo's cousin, not his uncle. Frodo simply calls him 'uncle' out of affection and the age gap between them.
title: Lord of the Rings

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In The Good Place, Eleanor, Chidi, Jason and Tahani meet Michael, the architect of the neighbourhood serving as their afterlife. Michael is aided by a female assistant called Janet, loaded with a huge store of knowledge. Janet guides the residents, acts as a walking database and can conjure any item they want.
error: a female assistant called Janet
correction: Um, actually, Janet isn't female - she's a program, not a person, and insists she is neither a robot nor a woman. She is also the foundational mainframe the whole neighbourhood runs on.
title: The Good Place

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: Over their lifespan, the Guitar Hero games drifted away from the rock focus of the early entries. The first game, released on the PS3 and Xbox 360, featured 30 rock songs by artists such as Black Sabbath, Deep Purple, Sum 41, Jimi Hendrix and Queen. The most recent, Guitar Hero Live, came to PS3, PS4, Wii U, Xbox 360 and Xbox One with 42 launch songs by the likes of Skrillex, Eminem, Rihanna, Katy Perry and Imagine Dragons.
error: The first game, released on the PS3 and Xbox 360
correction: Um, actually, the first Guitar Hero was a PlayStation 2 exclusive. The series only went multi-platform from Guitar Hero II onward.
title: Guitar Hero

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In John Wick, the titular hitman visits The Olympia, a luxurious hotel that serves as neutral ground for the underworld and where conducting business is forbidden. The hotel's owner, Winston, is an old friend of John's and tells him where to find the man who killed his beagle, Daisy, and stole his car.
error: The Olympia
correction: Um, actually, the hotel is called The Continental. It is the underworld's neutral-ground establishment, run by Winston.
title: John Wick

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: ThunderCats follows the eponymous team of heroes - cat-like humanoid aliens - who settle on a planet called Second Earth after fleeing their dying homeworld, Thundera. En route they are attacked by the Mutants of Plun-Darr, who are after the legendary Sword of Omens and the Eye of Thundera it holds.
error: a planet called Second Earth
correction: Um, actually, the planet is Third Earth. That is where the ThunderCats crash-land and build Cat's Lair after escaping Thundera.
title: ThunderCats

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: Balatro is a poker-inspired roguelike in which players build hands of up to five cards to score points. Because you can alter the cards in your deck, unconventional hands become possible, such as Five of a Kind, Flush House - a full house all of one suit - Flush Five, five identical cards, and Royal Family, a King, Queen and three Jacks.
error: and Royal Family, a King, Queen and three Jacks
correction: Um, actually, Royal Family isn't a hand in Balatro. Besides, that combination could be dealt from a standard deck, so it wouldn't need any custom cards anyway.
title: Balatro

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: The casual puzzle game Peggle, from Bejeweled and Plants vs. Zombies developer PopCap, has players launch balls at a field of pegs. By default the pegs are blue, but other colours mark special ones. Each level has 25 orange pegs that must be cleared to win. Green pegs are worth 50x more points but move every turn, while purple pegs grant a perk based on your chosen Peggle Master.
error: Green pegs are worth 50x more points but move every turn, while purple pegs grant a perk based on your chosen Peggle Master.
correction: Um, actually, those are the wrong way round. The green peg triggers your Peggle Master's power, while the purple peg is the roaming one worth 50 times the points.
title: Peggle

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In Quentin Tarantino's Inglourious Basterds, we meet SS officer Hans Landa as he visits the wheat farm of Monsieur LaPadite, where Shosanna is hiding beneath the floorboards. Three years later, Landa meets a grown-up Shosanna in Paris when her cinema is vetted after being chosen to host the premiere of Nation's Pride.
error: the wheat farm of Monsieur LaPadite
correction: Um, actually, LaPadite runs a dairy farm, not a wheat farm - which is why Landa asks for a glass of milk during the scene.
title: Inglourious Basterds

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: Thomas is one of many anthropomorphised vehicles on the Island of Sodor. Of the main Steam Team, Thomas, Gordon and Edward all wear blue, while Percy, Henry and Toby are green. James is the odd one out, the only Steam Team member with a red colour scheme.
error: Percy, Henry and Toby are green
correction: Um, actually, Toby isn't green - he's a brown wooden tram engine. It's Percy and Henry who are painted green.
title: Thomas the Tank Engine

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: The four films in The Twilight Saga chart Bella Swan's relationship with the vampire Edward Cullen. In the second, New Moon, the Cullens' departure from Forks, Washington sends Bella into a depression and closer to the newly lycanthropic Jacob Black. In the third, Eclipse, the love triangle deepens as Edward and Jacob vie for Bella, and she ultimately agrees to marry Edward.
error: The four films in The Twilight Saga
correction: Um, actually, there are five Twilight films, not four. The final book, Breaking Dawn, was split into two movies, Part 1 and Part 2.
title: Twilight

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: The Lego City range centres on buildings and vehicles that recreate real-world cities with a Lego twist. Its two most prolific themes are the Police and Fire Services, both flagship lines throughout the range's history. In 2023, Lego came under fire for its Police Training Academy set over the firing range included alongside the obstacle course, quad bike and horseback-training sections.
error: the firing range included alongside the obstacle course, quad bike and horseback-training sections
correction: Um, actually, there was no firing range in that set. Lego has a long-standing policy of never making realistic modern weapons, sticking to fantasy or historical ones.
title: Lego

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: The thirteen books that make up Lemony Snicket's series depict the Beauregard siblings, Violet, Klaus and Sunny, as they go through a series of weird and wonderful adoptive guardians. These include Uncle Monty the herpetologist, the perpetually scared Aunt Josephine, a man known as Sir who runs a mill and, of course, the nefarious Count Olaf who seeks the children's fortune.
error: the Beauregard siblings
correction: Um, actually, the children are the Baudelaire orphans, not the Beauregards. Violet, Klaus and Sunny Baudelaire are orphaned by a fire before Count Olaf begins pursuing their fortune.
title: A Series of Unfortunate Events

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: The 89th Academy Awards in 2017 were notable for a significant mistake when the Best Picture award was announced. When actors Warren Beatty and Faye Dunaway opened the envelope to announce the winner, they enthusiastically named La La Land as the recipient of the prize. As the crew behind the film were giving their acceptance speech, it was revealed that the correct winner was in fact Moonlight.
error: enthusiastically named La La Land
correction: Um, actually, they were hesitant, not enthusiastic. Beatty had been handed the duplicate Best Actress envelope reading "Emma Stone, La La Land", which is why he paused and showed it to Dunaway before she read out the film.
title: The Oscars

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: The Sinister Six is the name given to a group of supervillains commonly associated with Spider-Man. The founding members of the Sinister Six are Doctor Octopus, Electro, Rhino, Mysterio, Sandman and Vulture. Throughout various incarnations of Spider-Man many other villains have joined the group, including Hobgoblin, Venom and Lizard.
error: Rhino
correction: Um, actually, Rhino was not a founding member - that was Kraven the Hunter. Rhino has only ever been a later recruit to the team, appearing in versions such as the 2018 PS4 game.
title: Spider-Man

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: Getting your virtual humans in The Sims series to enter a pool and then remove the ladder has become a well known trope of the series. This deathtrap was finally removed with the launch of The Sims 4, where Sims gained the ability to climb out of a pool without needing a ladder. Drowning is still a possibility, however, if walls block their exit from the swimming pool.
error: finally removed with the launch of The Sims 4
correction: Um, actually, Sims could already climb out without a ladder in The Sims 3. On top of that, The Sims 4 launched with no pools at all - they were only added in a free update two months later.
title: The Sims

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: "Who Shot Mr. Burns?" Part One and Part Two are iconic "The Simpsons" episodes. As the final two episodes of the sixth season, broadcast in 1995, they feature Mr. Burns antagonising a large number of Springfield residents - including by planning to block out the sun - giving plenty of characters a motive. In the second part it is revealed that the shooter was in fact Maggie Simpson, who discharged Mr. Burns' own gun while he tried to steal a lollipop from her.
error: the final two episodes of the sixth season
correction: Um, actually, Part One was the Season 6 finale and Part Two opened Season 7. Airing months apart in 1995, the split let the cliffhanger linger over the summer and fuelled a nationwide guessing game.
title: The Simpsons

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: The owners of Paddy's Pub - Mac, Dennis, Frank and Charlie - employ Dee as the primary waitress. While she does not own a stake in the pub, she was given merchandising rights as part of the agreement for working there. Unfortunately the contract on which this was signed was eaten by Mac before the merchandising rights were later unwittingly signed over to the lawyer.
error: Mac, Dennis, Frank and Charlie
correction: Um, actually, Charlie is no longer an owner. He was an original investor in Paddy's but was tricked into giving up his shares over the years - most infamously selling a stake to Mac for half a sandwich.
title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: The original OutRun is iconic for its use of the Ferrari Testarossa. Across the series players have taken control of a wide range of Ferraris, including the F40, F50, Enzo, Dino and 250 GTO. While other cars appear as traffic, the only vehicles you drive are Ferraris. The exceptions are OutRunners, which uses fictional cars, and OutRun 2019, which uses "futuristic" fictional cars.
error: the only vehicles you drive are Ferraris
correction: Um, actually, Out Run Europa breaks that rule. It has the player pilot motorbikes and jet skis as well as cars, so Ferraris aren't the only vehicles you drive in the series.
title: OutRun

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: In Top Gun, the pilots attending the Naval Fighter Weapons School - a.k.a. Top Gun - fly the new F-14A Tomcat. During their training they carry out many exercises, called "Hops", in which both Maverick and Iceman show themselves to be among the most capable. However, the accidental death of Goose after Maverick gets caught in jet wash shakes Maverick's confidence and is a key factor in Iceman winning the Top Gun Trophy on graduation.
error: the new F-14A Tomcat
correction: Um, actually, the F-14 was not new. It had been the Navy's standard carrier fighter since 1974, when it replaced the F-4 Phantom aboard USS Enterprise, making it over a decade old by the film.
title: Top Gun

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: James Cameron's Titanic was previously the highest-grossing movie of all time. In 2012 the film received a 3D re-release and remaster in which some CGI was altered for accuracy. Changes included adjusting the night sky so the stars matched the night of the sinking, as well as fixing shots where the fourth and final smokestack did not emit smoke. Face replacements were also improved on some shots of DiCaprio and Winslet's stunt doubles.
error: fixing shots where the fourth and final smokestack did not emit smoke
correction: Um, actually, that was accurate to begin with. The real Titanic's fourth funnel was a dummy that never emitted smoke - it only ventilated the engine rooms and the first-class smoking room.
title: Titanic

author: By ashw92
phrase_text: The PlayStation 3 was a bit of an odd console, notoriously difficult for developers to get to grips with thanks to its complex Cell processor architecture.
